Modern Comforts: Xanthi Urban Living in Xanthi offers a recently renovated apartment with free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a kitchenette. The property includes a living room with a sofa bed, dining area, and city views.
Convenient Facilities: Guests benefit from private check-in and check-out, a paid airport shuttle service, lounge, daily housekeeping, family rooms, bicycle parking, and a tour desk. Additional amenities include streaming services, a coffee machine, and a walk-in shower.
Local Attractions: Located 17 minutes from the Folk and Anthropological Museum, 1.5 km from Antika Square, and 1.8 km from Xanthi Old Town. Nearby attractions include the Tobacco Museum Xanthi and Ecclesiastical Museum, each within 700 metres.
